summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flixz Netflix-style streaming platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend mostly functional with excellent user experience. Minor issue found with movie detail page display.

ui_bugs.issue: Movie detail page shows 'Content not found' for movie ID 299536
ui_bugs.details: Backend API returns 200 for movie details, but frontend shows 'Content not found'. May be frontend error handling or specific movie ID issue.

passed_tests: All TMDB movie endpoints (trending, popular, now-playing, upcoming, top-rated)
All TMDB TV endpoints (trending, popular, airing-today, top-rated)
Homepage with 3D carousel and trending movies
Browse page with all categories (Movies, TV Shows, Series, Documentaries, Kids, Sports, Live TV)
Protected routes access (My List, Watch Party)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix movie detail page display issue - investigate why frontend shows 'Content not found' when backend API returns valid data for movie details
